title: Primers used for real-time quantitative PCR to examine metabolic gene expression in liver, gastrocnemius muscle and adipose tissue in rat offspring exposed to prenatal alcohol.
author: Akison, Lisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This table provides details of primers used for qPCR analysis of specific metabolic genes in rat tissues exposed to a moderate, acute dose of prenatal alcohol.
steps_raw: This table provides details of primers used for qPCR analysis of specific metabolic genes in rat tissues exposed to a moderate, acute dose of prenatal alcohol.
